import sqlite3

def import_users(conn, users):
    cursor = conn.cursor()
    cursor.executemany(
        "INSERT INTO users (name, email, age) VALUES (?, ?, ?)",
        [(u["name"], u["email"], u["age"]) for u in users],
    )
    conn.commit()

def seed_permissions(conn, user_ids, permission_names):
    cursor = conn.cursor()
    cursor.executemany(
        "INSERT INTO user_permissions (user_id, permission) VALUES (?, ?)",
        [(uid, perm) for uid in user_ids for perm in permission_names],
    )
    conn.commit()
